channel.title: Internal Comms on Strategic Enrollment Marketing | Derby Carlson
channel.description: Recent content in Internal Comms on Strategic Enrollment Marketing | Derby Carlson

item.title: WE MADE THE PLAYOFFS?! (Narrator: They did not.)
item.description:
It’s March. The air is electric. I saw the words ‘Playoffs,’ ‘Watch Party,’ and ‘Free Food’ in a Teams thread…

> Status: Campaign Shelved. Assets archived.
